chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, MIRPURKHAS C.P. No.D-664 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.12.2025 Mr. Waqar Ahmed Malik advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ayaz Ali Rajper, Assistant A.G. Sindh along with Mumtaz Ali M.C. Mir Sher Muhammad Khan Talpur and Mashooque Ali U.C Secretary Khan. Petitioner Mst. Parwarish has filed this Constitutional Petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, seeking a direction to the respondent for the immediate release of the entire service benefits of her late husband. The officers present in Court have submitted that the petitioner has remarried; therefore, the pensionary benefits were withheld. However, they have expressed their willingness to disburse the service/pensionary benefits to the petitioner entitling her before second marriage. In view of the above, the service/pensionary benefits shall be released to the petitioner within a period of two weeks as per her entitlement without fail. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
